name: Yamato (Reprint)
effect_text: [Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[On Play] Look at all your Life cards; place 1 at the top of your deck and place the rest back in your Life area in any order.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the ST13 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
